experience.title: Tulane Technology Connection
experience.summary: Provided technology consultation and sales support for students and faculty, helping them evaluate Mac, iPad, and Dell products based on their academic and professional needs. Translated technical specifications and pricing into clear recommendations, processed orders through the PIMS POS system, and prepared Excel reports for vendor coordination. Developed strong communication, product knowledge, and customer trust in high-value purchasing decisions.
duties: Gathered and submitted Excel reports to major companies such as Apple.
Used the PIMS POS system for sales, quotes receiving and creating purchase orders.
Guided students and faculty in making technology purchase decisions for Mac, iPad and Dell products.
Gained solid comprehension of various Macintosh models and Dell laptops.

experience.title: Pontchartrain Partners
experience.summary: Served as the primary maintenance lead for the headquarters of a construction firm, overseeing daily facility upkeep and minor repairs. From landscaping to hands-on problem solving, I was responsible for keeping the building safe, functional, and presentable. The role strengthened my consistency, independence, and appreciation for the quiet discipline required to keep operations running smoothly.
duties: Maintained cleanliness and orderliness of both inside and outside of the building by cutting grass, collecting trash and debris around the building, cleaning restrooms, caring for plants, and mopping floors.
Performed light maintenance such as fixing leaking toilets.

experience.title: Canal Street Veterinary Hospital
experience.summary: Assisted with animal care during recovery, exams, and surgeries, gaining early experience working in a medical environment where calmness and attention to detail mattered. The role was hands-on and demanding, teaching me steadiness, empathy, and how to stay focused under pressure.
duties: Cared for sick and injured dogs and cats by feeding, walking, and bathing them.
Assisted doctor in exams and surgeries.
